div.p: Objective: Minimize GPU "Bubbles" by overlapping All-Reduce latency with subsequent chunk computation.
Why Overlap Works: On NVLink systems, communication bandwidth is often > computation requirements for large model layers. If $BW_{comm} > FLOPS_{layer}$, latency is completely hidden.

text.tspan: # Launch Async All-Reduce for finished bucket
